project.description: The project to add a Playwright configuration to.
project.x-prompt: What is the name of the project to set up Playwright for?

directory.description: A directory where the project is placed relative from the project root.

linter.description: The tool to use for running lint checks.

js.description: Generate JavaScript files rather than TypeScript files.

webServerCommand.description: The command to start the web server.

webServerAddress.description: The address of the web server.

enableTypedLinting.description: Whether to enable typed linting. For flat configs, this configures the recommended `parserOptions.projectService` and `tsconfigRootDir`. For legacy `.eslintrc` configs, this configures `parserOptions.project`. We do not enable this by default for lint performance reasons.

setParserOptionsProject.x-deprecated: Use `enableTypedLinting` instead. This option will be removed in Nx v24.

rootProject.description: Create a application at the root of the workspace

skipInstall.description: Skip running `playwright install`. This is to ensure that playwright browsers are installed.
